title: muietexture
description: this texture pack is for hypixel bedwars
body:
**This texture pack is for Hypixel bedwars.**

**changed textures**
1. every swords textures are changed. (Excluding golden sword and netherite sword)
2. every tools are changed (Excluding every hoes, and shovel)
3. golden apple, bridge egg, ender pearl and magic milk textures are changed.
4. The texture of all wools has been changed to make them easier to see. (Only the wool in Hypixel)
5. Textures for blocks with a large proportion of weight have been modified.
6. The textures of items in the Hypixel Tools tab have been edited.
7. Damage effects have been edited
8. Some Mob Effects are edited
9. Gradient effect has been added to the blocks in the Muietexture pack.

**Pictures**
![1.0.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3176d45be447ca2264923b856dd91458b39824e2.png)
![1.0.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bdcda3e8ba2b1f20fc63ec20354b9bf4760b1a9.png)
![1.0.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/349ad159e0ff49639cf2c1cf19b90953909b137d.png)
**texture pack version: 1.21.1 - 1.21.5, 1.8.9 (minecraft) 1.0.1(texture pack)**
